scripts.package:dir: npm run stage:backend-runtime && npm run verify:packaging-assets && npm run build && electron-builder --dir --publish never -c.electronDist=./node_modules/electron/dist
scripts.package:current: npm run stage:backend-runtime && npm run verify:packaging-assets && npm run build && electron-builder --publish never -c.electronDist=./node_modules/electron/dist
scripts.package:mac-zip: npm run stage:backend-runtime && npm run verify:packaging-assets && npm run build && electron-builder --mac zip --publish never -c.electronDist=./node_modules/electron/dist
scripts.package:ci:mac: npm run stage:backend-runtime && npm run verify:packaging-assets && npm run build && electron-builder --mac zip dmg --arm64 --publish never -c.electronDist=./node_modules/electron/dist -c.mac.identity=null -c.mac.hardenedRuntime=false
